page: Microsoft Azure DC96ads_v5 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the DCADSv5 server family. It is built on the x86_64 architecture and features an AMD processor. The instance provides 96 dedicated vCPUs and 384.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per vCPU. It operates under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This server type includes 3686 GB of local storage and is designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance disk configurations. There are zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with this instance. No GPU hardware is bundled with this configuration.

With a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and substantial local storage, this instance is designed for general-purpose workloads, database hosting, and enterprise applications requiring dedicated compute resources. The hardware profile offers resource density suitable for multi-threaded applications and data-intensive tasks without the overhead of specialized accelerators.
description: Microsoft Azure DC96ads_v5 is an x86_64 virtual machine instance from the DCADSv5 family, powered by an AMD processor and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 96 dedicated vCPUs and 384.0 GB of RAM, maintaining a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of memory per core. The instance is equipped with 3686 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage configurations, though it does not include any GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This resource configuration makes the server suitable for general-purpose enterprise workloads, large-scale databases, and multi-threaded applications that require high-density dedicated compute resources and substantial local storage capacity.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC96ads_v5 is an x86_64 virtual machine featuring 96 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 384.0 GB of RAM, and 3686 GB of local storage, designed for general-purpose and database workloads.
